pending_tasks.description: Fix 9 broken 'Learn more' links: replace https://github.github.com/gh-aw/patterns/ with /gh-aw/patterns/ at lines 79, 127, 178, 227, 277, 340, 391, 430, 455
Replace fictional narrative intro (lines 15-19) with professional context-setting paragraph
Fix broken NOTE callout: add '> ' prefix to line 17
Rename 'Using a magic secret' section to 'Using a reserved secret name'
Clarify UI steps 3 and 5 — both say 'Run workflow'; step 3 should read 'Click Run workflow to open the input form', step 5 'Click the green Run workflow button to start the run'
Trim --strict flag description from 189 chars to one concise sentence; move default-behaviour note into Long: block
Line 47: fix broken Quick Start URL from https://github.github.com/gh-aw/setup/quick-start/ to correct URL; line 21: replace informal narrative intro with professional paragraph
Line 61: replace 🧠 emoji in run-failure with ❌ — brain emoji is identical to run-started/run-success, making failure state visually indistinguishable
